allow: Bash(python -m pip install "pydantic[email]==2.7.1" "pydantic-settings==2.2.1" fastapi==0.111.0 uvicorn aiosqlite)
Bash(DATABASE_URL=sqlite+aiosqlite:///./test.db JWT_SECRET=testsecret python -c "from app.main import app; print\('OK'\)")

Bash(python -c " from pydantic_settings import BaseSettings import warnings, sys with warnings.catch_warnings\(record=True\) as w: warnings.simplefilter\('always'\) class S\(BaseSettings\): x: str = 'test' class Config: env_file = '.env' if w: for warning in w: print\('WARNING:', warning.category.__name__, str\(warning.message\)\) else: print\('No deprecation warnings for inner Config class'\) ")
Bash(python -c "from app.core.config import settings; print\('DB URL prefix:', settings.database_url[:20]\)")
Bash(python -c "from app.models import User, Recipe, MealPlan, MealPlanEntry, ShoppingList, ShoppingListItem, ProgressLog; print\('All models imported OK'\)")
